options.name: -baseName
options.description: base name of the added buffer and net

options.name: -dishonorUpfDomainBoundaryCheckForIsoLsStrategy
options.description: dishonour power-domain boundary check for isolation/level-shifter instances

options.name: -excNetFile
options.description: file containing list of excluded nets

options.name: -in
options.description: cell name(s) to buffer input ports

options.name: -out
options.description: cell name(s) to buffer output ports

options.name: -port
options.description: prepend port name to buffer and net names when base name is not given

options.name: -prePlace
options.description: inverter connected to the port is legally placed and the other inverter is left unplaced

options.name: -selNetFile
options.description: file containing list of selected nets

options.name: -skipRefinePlace
options.description: skip legalization of the new buffer/inverter (incremental placement needs to be run later to legalize it)

options.name: -status
options.description: specifies the placement status of the added buffer (placed/fixed/softfixed)

options.name: -suffix
options.description: suffix to use in buffer and net names
